name: project
description: Project lifecycle + Manage & Comply planner (workflow plane): new-project scaffolds a YODA/BIDS DataLad study; status-report renders PROJECT.md/funder reports from the ledger; people records CRediT/ORCID credit; log-decision captures decisions + rationale.
